createModal.title: Create New Task
createModal.description: Create a new task with a git worktree for isolated development.

taskDescriptions.worktree: Creates a git worktree and opens an AI coding agent.
taskDescriptions.manual: A general task without a git worktree or AI agent.
taskDescriptions.scratch: Creates an isolated directory with an AI coding agent, without a git repository.
taskDescriptions.draft: A planning checklist. Items are automatically injected into downstream agent prompts when they start working.

createModal.prefixHint: Prepended to the branch name for ticket linkage.
createModal.pullingFromRemoteHint: Pulling from remote — creating worktree may take a moment.
createModal.projectHint: Tasks without a project appear in the Inbox.
createModal.blockedByHint: Tasks that must be completed before this one can start.
createModal.pullToLatestHint: Pull latest changes from remote after creating worktree.
createModal.pullToLatestBlockedByUnpushed: {{count}} unpushed commit(s) on "{{branch}}" — push first to use Pull to Latest
createModal.uncommittedFilesNotice: {{count}} uncommitted file(s) in source repo (will not be in worktree)

errors.notGitRepo: Selected folder is not a git repository
errors.invalidUrlDescription: Please enter a valid URL including the scheme (e.g., https://)

initializeModal.title: Initialize as Worktree Task
initializeModal.description: Create a git worktree and start a coding session for "{{taskTitle}}"
initializeModal.pullingFromRemoteHint: Pulling from remote — initializing the worktree may take a moment.

executionHost.heading: Execution Host
executionHost.hint: Where the worktree and agent run. Locked once the worktree is created.
executionHost.confirmChange:
Change execution host?

This is a one-time decision — once the worktree is created, the host is locked and changing it requires deleting the worktree first.
